data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Implements SSL/TLS encryption to secure data transmitted between users and the server.
data.technical_spec: Uses HTTPS with TLS 1.2/1.3 protocols and strong cipher suites.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects against common web attacks by filtering and monitoring HTTP traffic.
data.technical_spec: Deployed WAF rules for OWASP Top 10 threat mitigation.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enforces multi-factor authentication for user accounts to enhance security.
data.technical_spec: Integrates OTP or biometric verification mechanisms.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security audits and vulnerability assessments.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes automated scanning tools and manual penetration testing.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts sensitive data at rest and in transit to protect user information.
data.technical_spec: Employs AES-256 encryption for database and file storage.
